How We Earn Money
About Us

About CreditDoc

We believe every American deserves access to clear, unbiased information about credit repair and lending services. CreditDoc exists to shine a light on an industry that has historically been opaque.

Our Mission

Millions of Americans struggle with damaged credit. The credit repair industry -- worth over $5 billion annually -- promises solutions, but the landscape is filled with confusing pricing, misleading claims, and companies that don't always deliver on their promises. Meanwhile, predatory lenders target the most financially vulnerable consumers.

CreditDoc was built to change that. We provide independent, research-backed reviews and comparisons of credit repair companies, personal lenders, and financial services so that consumers can make informed decisions -- not pressured ones.

What We Do

Independent Research

We analyze credit repair companies and lenders using publicly available data, including BBB ratings, CFPB complaint records, user reviews, and direct pricing verification.

Unbiased Comparisons

Our side-by-side comparisons help you evaluate credit repair services on the factors that matter: pricing, effectiveness, transparency, customer service, and ease of use.

Consumer Education

We provide guides, resources, and educational content to help consumers understand their rights under the FCRA and CROA, and to help them make informed choices about their financial health.

Verified Pricing

We verify pricing directly from company websites monthly. When prices change, we update our listings. You'll always see current, accurate pricing information.

How We're Different

We are not a credit repair company.

We don't sell credit repair services, originate loans, or provide financial advice. We compare services so you can choose the right one for your situation.

Compensation never influences our ratings.

Some companies featured on our site pay us referral fees. This compensation never affects our editorial ratings, rankings, or recommendations. We also feature companies that don't pay us anything.

Built by a finance professional, not marketers.

Our founder has 15+ years in consumer financial services -- not affiliate marketing. This is a financial research site built with industry expertise, not a content farm designed to rank on Google.

Our Founder

CD

Founder & Lead Analyst

Consumer Finance Specialist

Our founder brings over 15 years of experience in consumer financial services, with deep expertise in payments, lending, credit risk management, and financial operations across 10+ countries.

With an MBA from Warwick Business School and former COO-level roles at major financial services organizations, our founder has seen the lending and credit industry from the inside -- including the parts that don't always serve consumers well.

After leaving the corporate world in 2024, the mission became clear: build tools and resources that help underserved consumers navigate financial products with the same level of information that industry insiders have. CreditDoc is the result of that mission.

15+ Years Finance MBA, Warwick 10+ Countries Payments & Lending Risk Management Former COO

Contact Us

Have a question, correction, or suggestion? We'd love to hear from you. We take accuracy seriously and are always looking to improve our research.

Our editorial team independently reviews all services using our rigorous evaluation methodology. Compensation does not influence our ratings or rankings. Learn more.
